findings.title: T2 and T3 use incompatible base-path contracts for turn-counter icon loading
T2 automated regression does not enforce the wx-free compile contract
Feature-level evidence came from per-subtask verify worktrees rather than a final merged run

follow_up_feature_requests: Update FGame::drawTurnCounter() to pass short relative icon names into WXIconCache and update the T2 regression test to validate that contract.
Add an automated regression that fails if turn-counter image loading becomes double-prefixed after T2 and T3 are merged.
Replace the T2 text-inspection header regression with a compile-based automated check for including strategic/FGame.h in a non-wx translation unit.
After integrating T1 through T4, run and record one feature-level merged build plus tests/SSWTests pass.
artifact_commit_status: committed; see final response for commit hash
